EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGeocentricTranslation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control the 3D vector transformation with 3 translation values.

[Guid("063954B0-C1FB-11D2-BD07-0000F875BCCE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeocentricTranslation : IGeoTransformation, ITransformation

Properties

Name 

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Methods

GetParameters(out double, out double, out double)

Returns the translation values in meters for the X, Y and Z axis.

void GetParameters(out double dx, out double dy, out double dz)

Parameters

dx double
dy double
dz double

Examples

void GetSpatialReferences(out ISpatialReference from, out ISpatialReference to)

Parameters

from ISpatialReference
to ISpatialReference

PutParameters(double, double, double)

Sets the translation values in meters for the X, Y and Z axis.

void PutParameters(double dx, double dy, double dz)

Parameters

dx double
dy double
dz double
